zh.lifeSummary: 當Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell於1370年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，她的父親Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe26歲，母親Mariota Margaret Campbell25歲。她於1393年5月30日與Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1396年之後在英國蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell于1370年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，她的父亲Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe26岁，母亲Mariota Margaret Campbell25岁。她于1393年5月30日与Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1396年之后在英国苏格兰，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Arie, Avi, Eliezer, Erez, Etty, Haim, Hedva, Ilan, Itai, Moshe, Noam.
Jewish (Israeli): shortened and Hebraicized form of some original Ashkenazic surname starting in Mor-.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Mohr   2.

variants.name: Mohr
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a fen, Middle Low German mōr.
German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and Dutch (of German origin): nickname for a man of swarthy complexion, from Middle High German mōr, German Mohr, and Middle Dutch moor ‘Moor’.
German: from a short form of an old personal name, Morhart (see Morath ).

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Camble
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Campbel
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Cambell
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Marrion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Meirion .

variants.name: Meirion
meanings: Traditional: derived in the Roman period from Latin Marianus (a derivative of Marius; ).

nameMeanings.name: Mariotta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of Maria , now occasionally used as a given name in the English-speaking world. In Gaelic Scotland Mar(i)etta is sometimes found as an Anglicized form of Mairead, the Gaelic equivalent of Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell was born in 1370, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, was 26 and her mother, Mariota Margaret Campbell, was 25. She married Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief on 30 May 1393, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1396, in Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell est née en 1370, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mariota Margaret Campbell, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief le 30 mai 1393, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1396, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell 1370 in Lochawe, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe 26 und ihre Mutter Mariota Margaret Campbell 25. Sie hat am 30. Mai 1393 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1396 in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell è nata il nel 1370 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mariota Margaret Campbell, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief il 30 maggio 1393, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1396, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbellが1370年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochaweは26歳，母Mariota Margaret Campbellは25歳であった。1393年5月30日にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウでHector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chiefと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1396年以後にイギリススコットランドで死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell(이)가 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariota Margaret Campbell(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1393년 5월 30일 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

mn.Loch Awe, Argyll, Scotland: Lochawe, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell nasceu em 1370, em Lochawe, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mariota Margaret Campbell, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief em 30 de maio de 1393, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1396, em Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell родилась в 1370 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariota Margaret Campbell, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief 30 мая 1393 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1396 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell nació en 1370, en Lochawe, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mariota Margaret Campbell, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief el 30 de mayo de 1393, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1396, en Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Argyll, Scotland.
